name: Razorsharp Edge
desc_clean: Awoken 1 Dried out vines can deal more deadly blows, but they risk shattering more easily than their hydrated counterparts.
mechanic_summary: Razorsharp Edge to Spell klanu Awoken. Awoken 1 Dried out vines can deal more deadly blows, but they risk shattering more easily than their hydrated counterparts. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Awoken 1 Dried out vines can deal more deadly blows, but they risk shattering more easily than their hydrated counterparts. My efforts at strengthening these embrittled appendages have proven fruitless.
